description.sv: Välj protein: kyckling, lamm, lax eller scampi. Serveras med ris, stekt broccoli, sockerärtor, paprika, morötter, färsk koriander & masalasås.
description.en: Choose protein: chicken, lamb, salmon or scampi. Served with rice, sautéed broccoli, snow peas, peppers, carrots, fresh coriander & masala sauce.
